# definitions

<!-- AUTOGENERATED:BEGIN — do not edit; regenerated by `./singularity build` -->

## Plugin reference

- Description: Sidebar list, welcome pane, and detail pane (editable name/description, read-only step list, extensible WorkflowsDetail.Section slot) for the Workflows app.
- Web:
  - Slots:
    - `WorkflowsDetail.Section` ← `apps.workflows.executions`
    - `definitionDetailPane.Actions`
    - `definitionsRootPane.Actions`
  - Contributes:
    - `WorkflowsApp.Sidebar` "Workflows" → `WorkflowsSidebar`
    - `Pane.Register` "workflows-definitions"
    - `Pane.Register` "workflows-definition-detail"
  - Uses:
    - `apps/workflows/editor.DefinitionEditor`
    - `apps/workflows/shell.WorkflowsApp`
    - `infra/endpoints.fetchEndpoint`
    - `primitives/app-shell.SidebarPaneSection`
    - `primitives/css/scroll.Scroll`
    - `primitives/css/spacing.Stack`
    - `primitives/css/surface.Surface`
    - `primitives/css/text.Text`
    - `primitives/css/ui-kit.Button`
    - `primitives/css/ui-kit.ControlSizeProvider`
    - `primitives/data-view.DataView`
    - `primitives/data-view.defineDataView`
    - `primitives/data-view.FieldDef`
    - `primitives/editable-field.useEditableField`
    - `primitives/icon-button.IconButton`
    - `primitives/live-state.matchResource`
    - `primitives/live-state.useResource`
    - `primitives/loading.Loading`
    - `primitives/pane.Pane`
    - `primitives/pane.PaneChrome`
    - `primitives/pane.useOpenPane`
    - `primitives/relative-time.RelativeTime`
    - `primitives/slot-render.defineRenderSlot`
  - Exports (values):
    - `definitionDetailPane`
    - `definitionsRootPane`
    - `WorkflowsDetail`
- Cross-plugin:
  - Imported by: `apps/workflows/executions`
